sources.label: StockTitan NSSC news feed (latest PR remains May 4 FQ3 results; no June 5-9 items)

verdicts.rankRationale: No material news since June 6 and a -0.41% day move is pure noise; yesterday's verdict already pushed the name down to reconcile the adjusted-score rank gap, and nothing new on physical-security demand for compute campuses justifies moving again.
verdicts.bull: Recurring service revenue grew 15.4% YoY at a 90%+ gross margin (FQ3, May 4) and the -15.7% YTD drawdown has de-rated the name while the access-control/locking franchise is intact, improving asymmetry if data-center physical-security spend ever becomes a visible revenue line.
verdicts.neutral: Solid mid-cap security business compounding recurring revenue, but the AI-compute linkage remains speculative adjacency with no disclosed data-center campus wins; rank 57 on a strict latent-nodes screen fairly reflects low chain-criticality.
verdicts.bear: Equipment sales growth is single-digit and the AI thesis is a narrative stretch; if hardware demand softens or alarm-radio recurring growth decelerates, the stock de-rates further with no AI optionality to backstop it.
verdicts.primaryCatalyst: FQ4/FY2026 results (late August) showing recurring-revenue acceleration or any named data-center / high-security campus access-control win.
verdicts.primaryRisk: Continued equipment-segment softness and zero tangible AI-infrastructure revenue, leaving the name exposed as a low-relevance adjacency on a strict screen.
